description: SOVIET UNION WORKERS ARE FOR PEACE BUT READY TO DEFEND SOCIALIST FATHERLAND The workers and peasants of the Soviet Union are for peace but are ready to defend the workers fatherland at any time THE DAILY WORKER FIGHTS For a WorkersFarmers Government To Organize the Unorganized Against Imperialist War For the 40Hour Week VoLVI No 116 AUGUST FIRST WILL BE SOVIET ONION DEFENSE DAY Mill Prosecution Tries to Whitewash Roach and Gilbert ISSUETHOUSANDS OF LEAFLETS FOR TEXTILE MEETING 18000 Copies of Call Defense Bulletins Out in Carolina Press Favors U T W Witnesses Against Roach Hidden By LISTON OAK GASTONIA N C July 21 Eighteen thousand pieces of litera ture issued by the National Textile Workers Union and the Internation al Labor Defense the call for the Southern Textile Workers Confer ence at Bessemer City July 28 and the second number of the Gastonia Iabor Defender were distributed Saturday and Sunday to the mill workers throughout Gaston and Mecklinburg counties Hundreds of strikers took part in the distribution and reached the distant mills by ten autos The growing attendance at the meetings which are steadily increas ing in number and size and the responses to the call are alarming the
